---
title: "ENVS193DS final"
author: Sophie Pardehpoosh
date: "2026-03-13"
format:
  html:
    toc: true # use this to display a table of contents
execute:
  message: false # make sure messages don't show up
  warning: false # make sure warnings don't show up
---

## [Github repository](https://github.com/spardehpoosh/ENVS-193DS_winter-2026_final.git)

# Set up

```{r}
#| label: reading in packages and data
#| message: false

library(tidyverse) # general use
library(janitor) # cleaning data frames
library(here) # file/folder organization
library(readxl) # reading .xlsx files

# reading in data
kelp <- read_csv(here("data", "kelp_data.csv")) # storing kelp data as an object called kelp for problem 2
```


# Problem 1. Research Writing
